title: How to count the number of unique values in a range
task: Count how many distinct values a column contains (not the total count, the number of different ones).

google_sheets.note: Google Sheets has a dedicated COUNTUNIQUE; =COUNTA(UNIQUE(...)) also works.

explanation: UNIQUE returns the list of distinct values; wrapping it in COUNTA counts how many there are. Here apple/banana/cherry gives 3. Google Sheets also offers the one-step COUNTUNIQUE.
